scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && pnpm reset && pnpm seed
scripts.check:alpha-smoke: pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.check:alpha: pnpm check:secret-leaks && pnpm check:nhost-safety && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter @yurbrain/client test && pnpm --filter @yurbrain/db test && pnpm --filter mobile test && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.check:production-safety: pnpm check:security && pnpm check:authz-smoke && pnpm check:storage-smoke && pnpm check:alpha-smoke
scripts.test:nhost-safety: pnpm --filter @yurbrain/client test && pnpm --filter mobile test && pnpm --filter @yurbrain/db test && pnpm --filter api exec tsx --test src/__tests__/nhost-admin-graphql.test.ts
scripts.check:authz-smoke: YURBRAIN_TEST_MODE=1 pnpm --filter api exec tsx --test src/__tests__/sprint12/current-user-strict-mode.test.ts src/__tests__/sprint14/strict-current-user-enforcement.test.ts src/__tests__/sprint15/current-user-jwt-validation.test.ts src/__tests__/sprint15/two-user-isolation-high-value.test.ts src/__tests__/sprint17/strict-identity-fallback-denial.test.ts src/__tests__/sprint17/authz-route-denials.test.ts src/__tests__/sprint17/rate-limit.test.ts
